name: 30"x30" Blurry Treetops Framed Wall Art Canvas Board - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Serene Nature Decor
description:
Add the serene beauty of nature to your space with the 30"x30" Blurry Treetops Framed Wall Canvas Board from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This art piece seamlessly combines digital artistry with the tranquility of the outdoors, showcasing blurry treetops in earthy tones. The brown-framed canvas, with its horizontal orientation, brings a sense of calm and sophistication to any space. Hang it effortlessly with the secure D Ring mount, and let its aesthetic interest delight your guests every time they enter the room.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
